data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for expense capture (meals, lodging for out-of-town work), but the provided evidence does not include any information or checks related to these specific expenses. The linked use case mentions various needs, including expense capture, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system supports capturing expenses for meals and lodging, leading to a clear gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of expense capture functionality for meals and lodging.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
